name: Inghams Group Limited
analysis: ING's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.1000. Trade idea: entry A$2.1000, stop A$1.9404, target A$2.4198 (2.00:1) — then trail it.
